content_hints.description: The heart of Millhaven -- a cobblestone square surrounding the ancient watermill. The mill wheel creaks slowly in the river current, spraying fine mist across the worn stones. A notice board lists local bounties in faded ink.

npcs.name: Old Tomas
npcs.dialogue: Hear ye! The miller's cellar has been overrun by vermin of unusual size! The Council offers a bounty of fifty gold to any brave souls who clear the infestation!

content_hints.description: The Rusty Anchor -- Millhaven's only inn. Smoke-stained beams hold up a ceiling darkened by decades of hearth fire. The smell of mutton stew and spilled ale saturates the air. A cat sleeps on the mantelpiece.

npcs.name: Breta Ironhand
npcs.dialogue: Ale's a copper, stew's two. Room for the night? That'll be five silver. And before you ask -- no, I don't know what's in the cellar. I don't want to know.

npcs.name: Fingers Malone
npcs.dialogue: Psst. Over here. I seen things in that cellar. Big things. Toothy things. Wearing a little crown, I swear on my mother's grave. You interested in a job, or do I find someone braver?

content_hints.description: An open-air market -- three weather-worn stalls shaded by canvas awnings bleached pale by the sun. A donkey hitched to a post chews hay with single-minded devotion. The smell of tanned leather and dried herbs hangs in the air.

npcs.name: Gerda the Provisioner
npcs.dialogue: Fresh supplies! Rope, torches, rations -- everything an adventurer needs and nothing they don't. I don't sell swords. See the smith in Daggerford for that.

content_hints.description: A small stone chapel dedicated to Chauntea, goddess of agriculture. Candles flicker before a wooden altar carved with sheaves of wheat. The air smells of beeswax and dried lavender. A garden of medicinal herbs grows in the courtyard.

npcs.name: Sister Alara
npcs.dialogue: The harvest goddess watches over Millhaven, as she has for three hundred years. If you carry wounds, I can tend them. If you carry doubts -- well, I can tend those too.

content_hints.description: The northern gate -- two rotting timber posts and a rusty chain that hasn't been raised in living memory. Beyond lies the cellar entrance beneath the old mill, its stone steps descending into a darkness that smells of damp fur.

npcs.name: Guard Harken
npcs.dialogue: Watch yourself out there. Something's been digging under the mill -- something bigger than rats ought to be. Last fellow who went down came back missing two fingers and all his courage.
